18.name: HET-5 Red Fox
18.description: Performing a body shot with the HET deals 20% of the original shot's damage and performing a headshot deals 60% of the original shot's damage to all enemies within 3 meters of your target. This additional damage does not bypass enemy armor.

abilities.name: Base Skill
abilities.description: Performing a body shot with the HET deals 20% of the original shot's damage and performing a headshot deals 60% of the original shot's damage to all enemies within 3 meters of your target. This additional damage does not bypass enemy armor.

abilities.name: Spotter
abilities.description: All targets currently viewed through your HET scope are marked for your crew. When they are no longer in your line of sight, the marking ends. Other marking effects, such as manual marking from other players, will still be in effect.

abilities.name: Tungsten Core
abilities.description: You can penetrate through 4 more surfaces.

abilities.name: HESH Rounds
abilities.description: The range of your base skill is increased to 5 meters.

abilities.name: DU Core
abilities.description: You can penetrate through 4 additional surfaces.

abilities.name: HEIAP Rounds
abilities.description: Your base skill now deals 60% of the original shot's damage to additional targets if the initial shot is a body shot and 100% if it is a headshot.

19.name: Marcom Mamba MGL
19.description: Explosions from the Mamba fragment into 4 smaller cluster grenades, each dealing 0.25 of the original explosion damage.

abilities.name: Base Skill
abilities.description: Explosions from the Mamba fragment into 4 smaller cluster grenades, each dealing 0.25 of the original explosion damage.

abilities.name: Shockwave
abilities.description: Increases each Mamba explosion radius by 20%.

abilities.name: Precise Detonation
abilities.description: Explosions from the Mamba no longer harm civilians.

abilities.name: Drum Loader
abilities.description: You reload the Mamba 50% faster.

abilities.name: Hardened
abilities.description: You no longer take damage from your Mamba explosions.

abilities.name: Blast Trauma
abilities.description: Enemies within 15 meters of a Mamba explosion have their accuracy permanently reduced by 20%. (This effect does not stack).

34.name: M135 Arges
34.description: For every second you fire the minigun, your armor gains 1% additional damage reduction. Every second you do not fire the minigun, you lose 1% of this bonus damage reduction. Your total damage reduction can't exceed 90%. Unequipping the minigun will end all active bonuses.

abilities.name: Base Skill
abilities.description: For every second you fire the minigun, your armor gains 1% additional damage reduction. Every second you do not fire the minigun, you lose 1% of this bonus damage reduction. Your total damage reduction can't exceed 90%. Unequipping the minigun will end all active bonuses.

abilities.name: Kill Momentum
abilities.description: Every time you kill an enemy with the minigun, you gain an additional 1% armor damage reduction.

abilities.name: Tanking Up
abilities.description: If you have 0 armor plates left and your damage reduction bonus reaches 30%, you'll restore 1 armor plate. This effect won't trigger again until you call in a new OVERKILL minigun.

abilities.name: Battle Ready
abilities.description: As long as you are spinning the minigun's barrel, your bonus to armor damage reduction won't go down.

abilities.name: Death Merchant
abilities.description: Every time you kill an enemy with the minigun, you gain an additional 1% armor damage reduction if you are wearing a 2 plate armor or less, or 2% if you are wearing a 3 plate armor or higher.

abilities.name: Killer Armor
abilities.description: Your armor damage reduction bonus will not end when you unequip the minigun; however, the bonus will decrease over time as though you were not firing the minigun.

37.name: Interceptor
37.description: As long as your OVERKILL meter is at least 25% full, you can activate it to disable all cameras on the heist temporarily. Once activated, your meter will drain over time. When your meter reaches 0, this skill's effect will end. You can only use this skill once per heist and only if the alarm hasn't been raised. (This ability replaces your OVERKILL weapon).

abilities.name: Base Skill
abilities.description: As long as your OVERKILL meter is at least 25% full, you can activate it to disable all cameras on the heist temporarily. Once activated, your meter will drain over time. When your meter reaches 0, this skill's effect will end. You can only use this skill once per heist and only if the alarm hasn't been raised. (This ability replaces your OVERKILL weapon).

abilities.name: Threat Mapping
abilities.description: This skill now also marks all guards and cameras while active.

abilities.name: Power Efficiency
abilities.description: Decrease the rate at which your OVERKILL meter drains by 25%.

abilities.name: Signal Block
abilities.description: While this skill is active, radios can't go off, and any currently active radios will not expire. Once this skill's effect ends, any pending radios will activate, and any active radios will expire.

abilities.name: Backup Power
abilities.description: Decreases the rate at which your OVERKILL meter drains by an additional 25%.

abilities.name: Spam Call
abilities.description: While this skill is active, every guard's phone will activate, distracting them from their actions. If a guard is escorting a player, the guard will return to patrolling after this effect ends. If the guard is about to detain a player, the guard will go into Search mode instead.

38.name: Sociopath
38.description: If you have a full OVERKILL meter, you pull out a baseball bat on activation and drop any bag or body you are currently carrying. While you're wielding the baseball bat, all incoming damage is done to your OVERKILL meter instead. You can use light or heavy swings with the bat, inflicting light or heavy damage. You'll wield the bat until your OVERKILL meter reaches 0 or until you are downed. If you press the OVERKILL button while wielding the bat, your OVERKILL meter drops to 0. (This ability replaces your OVERKILL weapon).

abilities.name: Base Skill
abilities.description: Base activation ability described above.

abilities.name: Frenzy
abilities.description: When there are 3 enemies within 5 meters of you while using this ability, you take 20% less damage.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.description: Killing an enemy while this ability is active will restore 20% of your OVERKILL meter.

abilities.name: Rabid
abilities.description: As long as you are wielding your baseball bat, you are immune to stagger, stun, slow, disabling effects, and effects that prevent you from sprinting.

abilities.name: Berserker
abilities.description: Killing an enemy while this ability is active will restore 5 health points.

abilities.name: Master of Mayhem
abilities.description: Whenever you kill an enemy with a bat, enemies within 5 meters of that enemy will enter panic and miss all their shots for 5 seconds.

63.name: Karl Alfred M606
63.description: This big, beautiful death machine has been wreaking havoc since WWII. Usually takes two people to load, but you look like you can handle it. Just don't burn off your crewmate's face in the back-blast!

1.name: Frag Grenade
1.description: Throw the grenade, grenade goes boom. Hold it longer, it'll go boom faster. Tale as old as time.

2.name: Flashbang Grenade
2.description: Stun your enemies with a blinding light! Flashbanged cops make the best human shields.

3.name: Smoke Grenade
3.description: Enemies caught in your smokescreen will aim worse and move slower. If they've got asthma, they're screwed.

4.name: Throwing Knife
4.description: Use this ninja shit for a quiet kill, but remember to retrieve it from the body. Knives ain't cheap.

13.name: Shock Grenade
13.description: If you want your bacon extra crispy, this is just the thing for you. Throw it into a pack of cops, and watch them fry!

14.name: Studsgranat S18
14.description: A grenade that hits the ground, then springs upward to detonate at face level.

5.name: Armor Bag
5.description: Repairs your lost armor. Bite the bullet before the bullet bites you.

6.name: Medic Bag
6.description:
Replenishes some of your health and number of downs. You'll never need a doctor again!
If you heal beyond your maximum health, you gain Adrenaline, which acts as a temporary layer of extra health.

7.name: Ammo Bag
7.description: Restocks a portion of your ammo and throwables, which are key ingredients to not dying.

12.name: Sentry Turret
12.description: An automated ally for shootouts. The singularity's coming, so enjoy friendly robots while you can!

8.name: Micro Cam
8.description:
Drop this spy camera anywhere, access it any time. Good for marking enemies and stalking crushes.

You can place 4 Micro Cams at a time by default. This number will increase if you raise your carrying capacity with skills or armor frames.

9.name: Motion Sensor
9.description:
Marks up to 15 enemies in a 3-meter range. If someone's voguing, you'll be the first to know.

You can place 4 Motion Sensors at any time by default. This number will increase if you raise your carrying capacity with skills or armor frames.

10.name: ECM Jammer
10.description:
Let's jam! While active, all cameras and radios work stupid slow. Stack for stronger effects.

You can place 2 ECM Jammers at any time by default. This number will increase if you raise your carrying capacity with skills or armor frames.

11.name: Infrasonic Mine
11.description:
A sonic stun device, audible only to your victims. Be ready to shut them up when it wears off.

You can place 10 Infrasonic Mines at any time by default. This number will increase if you raise your carrying capacity with skills or armor frames.

18.name: Trip Laser
18.description:
Slap this nifty lil' guy on a wall, and its sensor will mark anyone who passes by for ten seconds.

You can place 2 Trip Lasers at any time by default. This number will increase if you raise your carrying capacity with skills or armor frames.

14.name: Medtech Frame
14.description: First Aid Kits replenish an additional {FirstAidPackHealthPerCharge} health {FirstAidPackHealthPerCharge}|plural(one=point,other=points).

15.name: Specialist Frame
15.description: If you have a tool in your loadout, you start the heist with {ToolCount} additional {ToolCount}|plural(one=tool,other=tools) of that type. (This is applied before the Extra Pockets skill.)

16.name: Saboteur Frame
16.description: If you have no throwable for {NoThrowableReplenishDelay} {NoThrowableReplenishDelay}|plural(one=second,other=seconds), replenish {NoThrowableReplenishCount} {NoThrowableReplenishDelay}|plural(one=throwable,other=throwables).

17.name: Mercenary Frame
17.description: Whenever you kill an enemy, restore {KillEnemyTraumaRestore} {KillEnemyTraumaRestore}|plural(one=point,other=points) of trauma to your Armor Plate.
